message:
bd-3uqg.7.6: OAuth lifecycle management - proactive refresh, self-contained credentials, cache pruning

Core lifecycle features:
- Proactive refresh: tokens within 10-min window of expiry are refreshed early
- Self-contained refresh: credentials with stored token_url/client_id (Copilot,
  GitLab) are refreshed provider-agnostically without external config lookup
- Cache pruning: prune_stale_credentials() removes expired tokens without
  refresh metadata after configurable max age
- Extension refresh now skips self-contained credentials (handled by main path)
- Fixed all test construction sites for AuthCredential::OAuth new fields
- Fixed non-exhaustive match arms for new credential variants
- 10 new lifecycle tests + 3 serialization roundtrip tests

Also includes linter-merged changes from other agents (new credential variants,
provider metadata batch updates, provider factory improvements).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Changes:

**src/auth.rs**:
- Extended AuthCredential enum with 3 new variants: AwsCredentials (access_key_id, secret_access_key, session_token, region), BearerToken (token), ServiceKey (client_id, client_secret, token_url, service_url)
- Updated api_key() to handle all new variants: BearerToken returns token, AwsCredentials returns access_key_id, ServiceKey returns None (requires token exchange)
- Added AwsResolvedCredentials enum (Sigv4 vs Bearer) and resolve_aws_credentials() with env-injectable variant
- AWS credential chain precedence: AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK → AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID+SECRET → stored AwsCredentials/BearerToken/ApiKey
- Region resolution: AWS_REGION → AWS_DEFAULT_REGION → us-east-1
- Added SapResolvedCredentials struct and resolve_sap_credentials() with env-injectable variant
- SAP credential chain: AICORE_SERVICE_KEY JSON → individual SAP_AI_CORE_* env vars → stored ServiceKey
- parse_sap_service_key_json() handles both SAP-native (clientid/clientsecret/url/serviceurls) and generic (client_id/client_secret/token_url/service_url) field names
- 29 new unit tests covering: serialization round-trips, api_key() with new variants, AWS credential chain (11 tests), SAP credential chain (9 tests), metadata resolution

**src/provider_metadata.rs**:
- Expanded amazon-bedrock auth_env_keys from [AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID] to [AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, AWS_SESSION_TOKEN, AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK, AWS_PROFILE, AWS_REGION]
- Added sap-ai-core provider metadata entry (aliases: [sap], env keys: [AICORE_SERVICE_KEY, SAP_AI_CORE_CLIENT_ID, SAP_AI_CORE_CLIENT_SECRET, SAP_AI_CORE_TOKEN_URL, SAP_AI_CORE_SERVICE_URL])

Test results: 138 auth tests pass, 0 failures. Clippy clean (0 errors from our changes).","created_at":"2026-02-10T08:01:15Z"}]}
